title: Rings and Jewelry
description: Adds rings and miscellaneous jewelry to Minecraft
body:
Basic mod that adds different rings and other types of jewelry (coming soon) to Minecraft.

Currently contains:

- Gold Ring
- Diamond Ring
- Emerald Ring
- Amethyst Ring
- To craft any of the ring types (besides gold), simply place the corresponding jewel immediately above a gold ring in the crafting table.

This mod will only have jewelry with precious metals found in vanilla Minecraft. For jewelry with gems found in my "Armor, Ores, and More" mod, also download the companion mod [Rings and Jewelry for AOaM](https://modrinth.com/mod/rings-and-jewelry-for-aoam).
